response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: they are a senior with 10+ years of experience, primarily using TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with only minimal Java exposure in past roles; German proficiency is only basic, violating a core requirement; their career trajectory and self-positioning as a senior/staff engineer make them overqualified and misaligned with an entry-level role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong contributions to open-source and community education (workshops, talks)
Proven agile practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and cloud infrastructure familiarity
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role; likely to be dissatisfied or leave quickly
German language proficiency is only basic, not sufficient for client collaboration
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript; Java experience is sparse and outdated
